decisions.briefing: Neutral market with the S&P up 0.4% offers a stable backdrop to deploy the $943 sitting idle across 4 open slots. UTI earns the highest conviction as the day's top screener name with confirmed volume surge. IONQ and AAL diversify exposure across quantum computing and travel recovery themes. Existing holdings — EAT, OLED, NSIT, SYNA — remain within normal range with no stop-loss or profit-target triggers visible.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities posted a quiet positive session with the S&P 500 gaining 0.4% and the NASDAQ rising 0.2%, as investors rotated into cyclical and momentum names without a single dominant headline. Semiconductor and tech stocks found support from continued AI infrastructure spending narratives, while airline and education sector stocks attracted momentum-driven buyers. The muted move suggests the market is consolidating recent gains rather than making a directional commitment ahead of upcoming economic data.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股今日溫和收漲，標普500指數上漲0.4%，納斯達克指數上漲0.2%，市場在缺乏單一主導消息的情況下，資金悄然輪動至週期性及動能類股。半導體與科技板塊受惠於人工智能基礎建設持續擴張的敘事而獲得支撐，航空及教育類股則吸引動能型買盤進場。此次漲勢幅度溫和，顯示市場正在近期升勢後進行整固，靜待即將公布的重要經濟數據指引方向。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A volume surge means a stock's trading volume is significantly above its recent average — typically 1.5x or more. When price rises alongside heavy volume, it signals strong conviction from buyers and makes the move more credible; low-volume rallies are easier to reverse because fewer participants are committed to the higher price.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 成交量激增是指某支股票的交易量顯著超過近期平均水準，通常達到1.5倍以上。當股價上漲同時伴隨大量成交，代表買方入場意願強烈，這樣的漲勢更具說服力；反之，若僅靠低量推動上漲，則較容易出現回落，因為認同高位價格的市場參與者相對有限。
